text:
Created attachment 255969
Video showing a workaround

(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #27)

Hm, still seems like the change didn't catch on (js didn't change).

I really would like to be able to help somehow, but I have no insight into the actual setup and you certainly have a billion other things to do. Thanks for trying, appreciate it.

I'm attaching a little screen recording, showing how to apply the patch and its results. I'll leave it at that (at least for this year and the next couple of months) ;)
